title: Filipino Kissed Herb Bilao
description: A Filipino-inspired claypot dish with a unique flavor profile featuring pink food coloring, made with a blend of herbs and spices. This dish is paleo-friendly and perfect for a light meal or snack.
instructions: Heat a claypot over low medium heat on the stove.
Add the basmati rice and water to the pot and mix well.
Add the pink food coloring and stir to combine.
Bring the mixture to a boil and then reduce heat to low and cover the pot.
Simmer for 15 minutes or until the rice is cooked.
While the rice cooks, mix together the chopped fresh herbs and spices in a separate bowl.
Once the rice is cooked, fluff it with a fork and add the herb mixture on top.
Return the pot to the heat and stir gently for 1-2 minutes to combine.
